title: Directory Listing Enabled on /ftp/ Endpoints
description: Directory listing is enabled on the /ftp/ endpoint, revealing the contents of the FTP-accessible directory including acquisitions.md, legal.md, and a quarantine/ subdirectory. This exposes the file inventory to unauthenticated attackers and aids in identifying potential targets for path traversal or sensitive file access.
poc: GET /ftp/ → HTTP 200 with HTML directory listing showing files: acquisitions.md, legal.md, quarantine/
proof: Observed directory listing on /ftp/ endpoint. GET /ftp/ returns HTTP 200 with an HTML directory listing showing files including acquisitions.md, legal.md, and quarantine/ subdirectory.

proof_excerpts.excerpt: Observed directory listing on /ftp/ endpoint. GET /ftp/ returns HTTP 200 with an HTML directory listing showing files including acquisitions.md, legal.md, and quarantine/ subdirectory.
